betterquesting:10.desc:8:
Seeing it right in front of me, it is impossible to deny it.
The life of the Undead Lord of Gluttony, a lord to the sinners. Essentially, a devil.
This existence, it seems quite repulsive. 
Am I to be evil? Is this Mission one of injustice?
'Sinners', they must be punished, don't they?
That sounds evil, so wouldn't it be more 'moral' to just escape? To abandon the Mission?
Well...
The Meatball Man, he escaped this fate, he abandoned the Mission. And where has this taken him.
War, destruction, slavery. And after all of that, things are back in place as they were before.
And now, that same yoke is placed on my shoulders. Such a repulsive yoke.
I know what happens when running away, so I will not, but I cannot deny that I hate this fate.
No, not 'I'. The one I see reflected in the Spren.
I saw that person, and I can learn from it. This Mission exists, whether I want it or not, and it is me who was tasked to take it on.
But do I even know why it exists? Do I claim to understand it, even before undertaking it?
No, I cannot say I do. Who knows what types of answers I will encounter when I finally embark on this Mission!
And still, it is what I am asked to do. So if I have to be evil, to be bad, I can at least try to be good at it!
